tasks.subject: Task 0: Documents schema migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create documents, chunks, messages.parts, the storage bucket, and add documents to the realtime publication.

**Files:**
- Create: supabase/migrations/20260508_documents_schema.sql

**Verify:** pnpm db:reset && pnpm generate && pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["supabase/migrations/20260508_documents_schema.sql"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm db:reset && pnpm generate && pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["pnpm db:reset runs cleanly","\\d public.documents shows expected columns/indexes/policies","\\d public.chunks shows HNSW + GIN indexes","documents is in supabase_realtime publication","pnpm generate produces typed entries for documents, chunks, messages.parts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add new env var + dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install mammoth, js-tiktoken, openai. Add OPENAI_API_KEY to env validation and example.

**Files:**
- Modify: package.json
- Modify: src/lib/env.ts
- Modify: .env.example

**Verify:** pnpm install && pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","src/lib/env.ts",".env.example"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm install && pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["pnpm install succeeds","OPENAI_API_KEY exposed by env.ts",".env.example documents OPENAI_API_KEY"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Storage helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Server-only module wrapping the documents bucket (path construction, upload, download, delete).

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/storage/documents.ts
- Create: src/lib/storage/documents.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/lib/storage/documents.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/storage/documents.ts","src/lib/storage/documents.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test src/lib/storage/documents.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["documentObjectPath builds <user>/<thread>/<doc>.<ext>","upload/download/delete throw on Supabase errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Tokenizer + chunker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure module producing ordered chunks (800-token windows, 100-token overlap, single chunk if total < 2000, boundary-snapped).

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/documents/types.ts
- Create: src/lib/documents/chunk.ts
- Create: src/lib/documents/chunk.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/lib/documents/chunk.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/documents/types.ts","src/lib/documents/chunk.ts","src/lib/documents/chunk.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test src/lib/documents/chunk.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["single chunk for short input","single chunk when total < 2000 tokens","long text splits with sequential chunk_index","non-final chunks ~800 tokens","chunks overlap","snaps to paragraph boundary within ±50 tokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Extractor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** extractText({kind, bytes, byteSize}) for pdf/docx/md/txt with structured errors (ExtractTooLargeError, ExtractEmptyError).

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/documents/extract.ts
- Create: src/lib/documents/extract.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/lib/documents/extract.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/documents/extract.ts","src/lib/documents/extract.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test src/lib/documents/extract.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["txt and md decode utf-8","docx calls mammoth.extractRawText","pdf calls Anthropic Haiku","ExtractTooLargeError on finishReason=length","ExtractEmptyError on tiny output for big input"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Embedder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** embedChunks(inputs) batches OpenAI text-embedding-3-small calls (96 per request); returns { model, vectors }.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/documents/embed.ts
- Create: src/lib/documents/embed.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/lib/documents/embed.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/documents/embed.ts","src/lib/documents/embed.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test src/lib/documents/embed.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["returns model id and parallel vectors","batches when input length > 96","propagates errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: documentIngest Inngest function
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire extract → chunk → embed → index as Inngest steps; flip status to ready/failed with structured error codes.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/inngest/document-ingest.ts
- Modify: src/lib/inngest/functions.ts (registry)

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/inngest/document-ingest.ts","src/lib/inngest/functions.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["id is document-ingest, triggered by document/ingest.requested","success: status=ready, token_count, chunk_count, ready_at set; chunks rows exist","extract/embed/cap failures mapped to error_code","concurrency limit set to 5"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Upload + read routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /api/threads/:id/documents (multipart) and GET /api/threads/:id/documents (list); validate per spec; trigger Inngest.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.ts
- Create: src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/app/api/threads/\[id\]/documents/route.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.ts","src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test","acceptanceCriteria":["401 unauthenticated, 404 unowned, 413 oversize, 415 bad mime, 409 duplicate/file-cap/token-cap, 201 success","uploads to storage and inserts processing row, sends inngest event","GET returns user's documents for the thread"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Retrieval tools (search_corpus, neighbors, metadata)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AI SDK tool factory createDocumentTools({ threadId }) — hybrid (RRF) search, neighbor expansion, document metadata; all scoped to threadId via closure.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/ai/tools/documents.ts
- Create: src/lib/ai/tools/documents.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm test src/lib/ai/tools/documents.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/ai/tools/documents.ts","src/lib/ai/tools/documents.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm test","acceptanceCriteria":["search_corpus returns chunk rows with fused score; vector + lexical halves run in parallel","get_chunk_neighbors clamps before/after to [0,3]; cross-thread returns []","get_document_metadata cross-thread returns null","all tools enforce documents.status='ready'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Wire tools + parts persistence into chatStream
tasks.description:
**Goal:** chatStream uses createDocumentTools; consumes result.fullStream; persists tool steps + text into messages.parts; continues to publish text deltas to realtime channel.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/lib/inngest/functions.ts (chatStream)

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/inngest/functions.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["streamText includes tools and stopWhen: stepCountIs(5)","fullStream consumed; text deltas published as realtime delta events","tool calls/results accumulated and persisted to messages.parts","system prompt nudges retrieval tool use"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Document chip rail UI + realtime hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** useThreadDocuments hook (SSR initial + realtime INSERT/UPDATE) and DocumentChipRail component.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/(authed)/chat/use-thread-documents.ts
- Create: src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.tsx

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app/(authed)/chat/use-thread-documents.ts","src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["hook returns documents+refresh and subscribes to INSERT/UPDATE","chip renders state icon and error tooltip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: SSR initial documents + composer integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Page SSR loads documents; chat-view shows chip rail; paperclip + drag-drop upload to the route.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/(authed)/chat/page.tsx
- Modify: src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app/(authed)/chat/page.tsx","src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint","acceptanceCriteria":["page passes initialDocuments to ChatView","chip rail renders above the composer","paperclip opens picker; drop uploads files","upload action disabled with tooltip when no thread yet"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Render assistant `parts` in the message log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When messages.parts is non-null, render parts in order: text segments inline, tool calls/results in collapsed panels.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx
- Modify: src/app/(authed)/chat/page.tsx

**Verify:** pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx","src/app/(authed)/chat/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["SSR loads messages.parts and passes to view","parts != null renders text + collapsible tool panels","streaming-time messages still render via text"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: End-to-end manual smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify happy path and key failure modes against running stack.

**Files:** none (manual test).

**Verify:** Manual.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"pnpm db:reset && pnpm dev","acceptanceCriteria":["upload TXT/MD/DOCX/PDF flips chips to ready","chunks rows are created","agent answers using a unique phrase from a doc","cross-thread isolation enforced","validation surfaces (too_large, unsupported_type, duplicate_name, file_count_cap)","scanned PDF flips to failed with extract_empty","RLS denies cross-user reads","typecheck and lint pass"]}
```
